My focus is on confirming the removal of the audible disconnect and identifying any unintended side effects from state management.

I'm now prioritizing refining the notification logic. Currently, a toast appears for every disconnect, leading to potential "flapping" with unstable connections. This should improve user experience and reduce noise. I'm focusing on `App.tsx` and evaluating more subtle state change integrations as well.

I'm exploring non-persistent, subtle toast alternatives only if the team health or visual cues are deemed insufficient.

I'm now prioritizing enhanced UI clarity for the Scrum Master regarding user disconnections. I'm exploring a "Waiting for X users" banner during voting to provide more context. My goal is a less interruptive yet informative approach.
